programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days
programme.desc: First Look; tensions erupt at the Tell All finale when explosive accusations come to light; Daniel confronts Lisa about cheating, Molly questions Sheena's future, Trish reveals the father of her baby, and Emma calls out Elise for crossing a line.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.sub-title: Between the Sheets: The Art of the Slow Fade
programme.desc: Sophie cringes reliving her date with Brian and gets some extra intel from Julia. The cast is at their wits' end watching Cortney entertain Colt back in Orlando. Everyone has big opinions about Gino's breakup and Kim's first date with Wayne.

programme.sub-title: More to Love: Tell All: Part 1
programme.desc: With bonus scenes; the couples share the latest updates on their relationships; jam-packed with secrets and shocking reveals, plus a new confessional cam capturing unfiltered opinions, the night leaves tensions at an all-time high.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?
programme.desc: Angela invites a PI on set who reveals if Michael is scamming her; Patrick plays referee between Thais and John; Rob and Sophie argue about flushing the toilet; things get heated in the hot tub.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Real Life Hulks
programme.desc: These men do anything to enlarge their muscles in their quest to take on huge proportions, including injecting oil into their muscles to inflate them.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Tiffany has progeria, a condition that causes her to age rapidly, yet she's already outlived her life expectancy; single dad Ryan was born with arthrogryposis, leaving his arms and legs fused.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: At just 18 years old, Loren was involved in a catastrophic forklift accident; to save his life, doctors cut him in half; Sofia was an active 29-year-old when her heart went into end-stage failure; now she must be plugged-in to stay alive.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Lukas has Parry-Romberg Syndrome, causing half his face to shrink inward; Stefani's rare muscular dystrophy leaves her dependent on her mother but craving independence; Ellie says steroid withdrawal left her with lizard skin and seeks a cure.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.sub-title: Main Character at the Bachelorette Party
programme.desc: Liz and Brice's engagement brings new challenges to the Johnston family; plans are made for a fall wedding in Trent and Amber's backyard, but tough conversations about costs and timelines make it clear that compromises will be necessary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.sub-title: POV: Now You're Training a Chicken
programme.desc: The family works on wedding projects, Trent has a job for Boppa golf, Alex and Emma tackle school projects, and Liz worries about her wedding dress alterations going smoothly.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.sub-title: He's Low-Key Chopping Down a Tree
programme.desc: Amber and Emma surprise Liz with a bridal shower. Jonah and Alex help Brice get over his fear of public speaking. Trent cuts down a tree in the backyard, but concerns rise as he begins having heart palpitations. The family experiences a devastating loss.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: Barry is ready to start dating for the first time in 25 years; Kim puts her trust in Lydia's hands; Ethan puts it all on the line in a make-or-break decision.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: Barry and Ken have an awkward exchange; Isaac is devastated over his decision to leave Kaylynn; Barry turns to a matchmaker as he embarks on his dating journey; Ethan decides the only way to get Teegan back is by doing something very unexpected.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: Moriah gives a glimpse into her life in Montana; Isaac looks for a reconciliation with Kaylynn; Ethan hopes his rather complicated plan to surprise Teegan doesn't backfire; Barry learns what people are saying about him in town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.sub-title: Dear Diary, I'm Praying for a Miracle
programme.desc: Cortney and Colt take the next step and move into her parents' house, despite Cortney's concerns about Colt's loyalty; Jovi helps Yara study as her citizenship is on the line; Robert and Anny have heavy emotions as they welcome their new baby.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.sub-title: Dear Diary, I'm Ready to Move On
programme.desc: Chantel's new girlfriend Ashley worries she may be moving too fast; Sophie files for divorce and heads to LA to tell Rob the news; after battling a breakup and serious health issues, Liz may need to leave Seattle.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.sub-title: Dear Diary, Something Needs to Change
programme.desc: Natalie wants to improve her confidence and considers getting a nose job; Thais reveals that Patrick's trust issues are affecting their marriage; Emily and Kobe's conflicting parenting approaches come to a head at dinner with her parents.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.sub-title: Well, That Didn't Go As Planned
programme.desc: Each day we assume life will go along just as we planned, until it suddenly and comically doesn't; unanticipated failures, schemes going sideways, good intentions gone wrong life is most entertaining when nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Featuring cringe-worthy fails, flubs and faux pas that everyone would all prefer to forget; you can't bury the memory and pretend your most mortifying moment never happened when the camera catches it all.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: John vacations with Meghan and is pushed to his limits; Tyray finds out if he can move forward with weight loss surgery; Meisha's daughters set her up with a matchmaker in hopes of finding her true love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: Bella and Hunter enjoy a family golf day, but tension brews when it is revealed Hunter is failing school; Isabella pressures Bryce to find a job; Amya goes into labor; after 23 hours and an epidural, she prepares to push with her mom and Jose by her side.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: Amya's exhausting labor reaches a critical moment; Isabella and Bryce's already fragile relationship may be irreparable when their families join in the conflict; Mia's spending spree for her over-the-top baby shower doesn't sit well with her father.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: Emotions run high as Hunter faces another setback with his father. Isabella and Bryce's relationship spirals amid family tensions. Amya navigates the realities of bringing baby Sammy home, while Mia clashes with her dad over his traditional values.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: Mia's baby shower is upended when her mom arrives late; Mama G pushes Jose to prove he can provide; Isabella and Bryce's families prepare for a tense sit-down; Bella and Hunter's growing strain erupts ahead of a major milestone.

programme.title: Unexpected
programme.desc: With her due date approaching, Bella learns she may need a C-section; Tasha confronts Bryce's family over serious allegations; Amya and Jose clash before his new job. Mia pushes back against Keith's two-week rule.

programme.desc: Bella delivers baby Wes via C-section while Hunter hopes his dad will come to meet his grandson. Mia's graduation is overshadowed by her mom's behavior. Amya faces mounting pressure as postpartum and weight gain struggles begin to take a toll.
